sink.preCopyScript: IF OBJECT_ID('ODS.LP_SWR_cst_Customers')  IS NOT NULL TRUNCATE TABLE ODS.LP_SWR_cst_Customers

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT
id	,
CustNumber	,
nmp_Descr	,
FirstName	,
LastName	,
nms_Descr	,
Address1	,
Address2	,
City	,
State	,
CASE WHEN LEN(TRIM(Zip))>=6	THEN SUBSTRING(TRIM(Zip),1,5) ELSE TRIM(Zip) END AS Zip,
Zip4	,
Phone	,
Email	,
DateAdded	,
AddedBy	,
LastChanged	,
LastChangedBy	,
Directions	,
CallMorning	,
CalLAfternoon	,
CallEvening	,

MailingZip	,
MailingZip4	,
Email2	,
cst_user_1	,
cst_user_2	,
cst_user_3	,
cst_user_4	,
cst_user_5	,
cst_user_6	,
cst_user_7	,
cst_user_8	,
cst_user_9	,
cst_user_10	,

cst_user_20	,
bld_id	,

LLSource	,
LLDate	,
mpnt_id	,
QBXML	,
CallOptIn	,

TextOptIn	,
TextOptInDate	,

FROM dbo.cst_Customers WITH (NOLOCK)

sink.preCopyScript: IF OBJECT_ID('ODS.LP_CTA_cst_Customers')  IS NOT NULL TRUNCATE TABLE ODS.LP_CTA_cst_Customers

source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT CASE 
    WHEN CHARINDEX('-', Zip) > 0 
    THEN LEFT(Zip, CHARINDEX('-', Zip) - 1)
    ELSE Zip 
END AS ShortZip,
*
FROM dbo.cst_Customers WITH (NOLOCK)
